thought: Blend the scraped combat rhythm into the locked promotional poster by treating the first frame as a title-card-to-action transition instead of instantly converting it into full gameplay. Keep the original promotional_art composition, center hero, top logo, lower slogan, and diagonal bottom-left to top-right attack flow unchanged for the opening beat. Use subtle ambient motion first, then animate the hero with a short forward thrust based on the timing language of @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4: brief wind-up, compact explosive strike, dense hit feedback, then a short settle. Borrow the reference video's fixed readable camera, central impact emphasis, bursty damage-number timing, and lightning-like impact cadence, but scale it into a poster-safe micro-battle reveal with parallax ghosts, flame-bright weapon crack, impact streaks, and restrained floating numbers near the upper-right enemy cluster. This preserves logic continuity from the static splash image while still delivering a game-like combat payoff in the same cute medieval fantasy ARPG style. I selected only essential assets to stay under the asset limit and added stability constraints for face, anatomy, composition, and non-jitter motion.
prompt_en: First Frame: @dc63bbb61a51229af0303fbae8593383.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4. Motion Style Reference: adopt the readable fixed-camera burst rhythm from the reference video, with a short wind-up, compact high-impact strike, dense damage-number eruption, strong hit feedback, then a controlled settle, while preserving the original promotional poster layout and diagonal attack flow. Create a 6s vertical screen side-scrolling fantasy game promo animation in cute medieval fantasy, stylized mobile ARPG, bold comic lighting, clean combat readability. Start with @dc63bbb61a51229af0303fbae8593383.png as the first frame to lock character consistency, poster composition, logo position, slogan placement, and center focus. [00s-01s] (Background Layer) Hold the cathedral-like dark hall from the first frame, add very subtle parallax depth and drifting toxic green mist using @green_mist_toxic_parallax_fx_215446.png, keep blue spectral enemies hovering gently in place. (Character/Action Layer) The hooded hero remains frozen in the original lunging pose with only slight cloak and body breathing motion from @hero_promo_idle_to_thrust_sheet_215229.png. (VFX Layer) The horned weapon flame crack softly brightens. (UI Layer) Add a faint premium glow pulse to the top logo and lower slogan with @promo_logo_slogan_glow_ui_215535.png, keeping all text anchors unchanged. [01s-02s] (Background Layer) Maintain the exact poster arrangement and diagonal visual flow from bottom-left to top-right. (Character/Action Layer) The hero performs a slow controlled wind-up, shoulders tightening and weapon drawing back by a small distance, following the anticipation timing of @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4 without large displacement. (VFX Layer) Green mist thickens slightly around the lower beam, blue ghosts begin a small recoil-ready hover using @ghost_enemy_hover_hit_sheet_215314.png. (UI Layer) Logo glow intensifies briefly, no gameplay HUD yet. [02s-04s] (Character/Action Layer) The hero drives the horned flaming weapon forward along the original diagonal axis toward the upper-right, using @hero_promo_idle_to_thrust_sheet_215229.png, compact and forceful rather than exaggerated, with stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. (VFX Layer) Trigger a bright slash streak and fiery impact burst from @flaming_weapon_slash_fx_sheet_215400.png, synchronized to the burst cadence of @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4; add a lightning-like pulse, short shockwave, sparks, and orange-gold energy flare on contact. The upper-right ghost cluster recoils with head snap and backward hover knockback using @ghost_enemy_hover_hit_sheet_215314.png. (UI Layer) Spawn dense but readable floating red-yellow damage numbers near the hit zone with @floating_damage_ui_pack_215626.png, stacked in two to three fast pulses, suggesting continuous hit combo and critical strikes while keeping the hero silhouette readable. [04s-05s] (Background Layer) Parallax settles, mist trails continue drifting. (Character/Action Layer) Hero holds the extended thrust pose for a beat, then eases into a slight follow-through recoil while remaining centered and poster-like. (VFX Layer) Impact particles dissipate outward, weapon flame stays vivid, blue ghost enemies flicker as if partially dispersed. (UI Layer) Damage numbers taper off, the bottom slogan flashes once with @promo_logo_slogan_glow_ui_215535.png to reinforce call-to-action energy. [05s-06s] (Background Layer) Return to a stable living-poster tableau in the same dungeon hall. (Character/Action Layer) Hero settles into a proud forward-leaning end pose still matching the first-frame composition. (VFX Layer) Leave faint ember trails and soft green haze. (UI Layer) Top logo and lower slogan remain crisp and bright, ending as a polished promotional splash ready to cut into gameplay. Camera language: portrait mobile framing, low-angle dynamic poster view, mostly locked camera with only a tiny push-in during impact, no complex orbit, no jitter. Lighting: high-contrast comic key light on hero, neon blue-green ghost accents, warm orange weapon glow, subtle rim light on hood and armor. Final quality: 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, sharp focus, clean outlines, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement, readable UI, no jitter.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @dc63bbb61a51229af0303fbae8593383.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4。动作风格参考: 借鉴参考视频中固定机位、高可读性的爆发节奏——先短暂蓄势，再紧凑重击，随后伤害数字密集喷发、受击反馈明确，最后稳定收束；但整体必须严格延续原始宣传海报构图，不可直接改成完整实机战斗界面。制作一个6秒竖屏横版卷轴感的奇幻手游宣传动效，风格为Q萌中世纪幻想、卡通ARPG、海报级夸张造型、战斗信息清晰。以 @dc63bbb61a51229af0303fbae8593383.png 作为首帧锁定角色样貌、服装、Logo位置、底部标语位置、中心主体和对角线动势。[00s-01s] （背景层）保持首帧中的黑暗教堂/大厅场景不变，仅加入非常轻微的景深视差与漂浮毒雾，使用 @green_mist_toxic_parallax_fx_215446.png；周围蓝色幽灵敌人轻轻悬浮，不改变原有站位关系。（角色/动作层）中心兜帽英雄保持原始前冲姿态，只加入极轻微的呼吸感和披风摆动，参考 @hero_promo_idle_to_thrust_sheet_215229.png。（特效层）号角状燃烧武器上的橙色裂焰微微变亮。（UI层）顶部Logo与底部大字标语使用 @promo_logo_slogan_glow_ui_215535.png 做一次很轻的呼吸发光，锚点必须保持不变。[01s-02s] （背景层）继续保持原海报构图与从左下到右上的对角线动势。（角色/动作层）英雄进入短促蓄力：肩部收紧，武器向后小幅回拉，严格参考 @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4 的爆发前摇节奏，但不要产生大位移。（特效层）下方木梁周围绿色雾气略微加重，蓝色幽灵开始出现准备受击前的轻微悬停抖动，使用 @ghost_enemy_hover_hit_sheet_215314.png。（UI层）仅加强Logo辉光，不出现完整战斗HUD。[02s-04s] （角色/动作层）英雄沿首帧既有的左下到右上攻击轴线，将燃烧武器紧凑而有力地向前刺出，使用 @hero_promo_idle_to_thrust_sheet_215229.png；动作要短、稳、狠，不夸张乱飞，同时保证面部稳定不变形、五官清晰、结构正常、比例自然、动作不僵硬。（特效层）使用 @flaming_weapon_slash_fx_sheet_215400.png 触发一道明亮斩击轨迹和火焰爆裂，并同步参考 @trimmed_best_ref_1774792306.mp4 的爆发节奏，加入类似雷击的高亮脉冲、短促冲击波、火花与橙金能量爆闪。右上方幽灵敌群使用 @ghost_enemy_hover_hit_sheet_215314.png 产生明显受力反馈：头部后仰、整体向后飘退、轮廓闪烁。（UI层）使用 @floating_damage_ui_pack_215626.png 在受击区域上方喷发密集但仍可读的红黄伤害数字，分2到3波快速跳出，表现连续命中、暴击与刷图爽感，但不能遮死主角轮廓。[04s-05s] （背景层）视差逐渐稳定，绿色雾迹继续缓慢漂移。（角色/动作层）英雄维持刺击完成后的延展姿态一瞬，再做轻微收势回弹，但仍保持居中海报主角感。（特效层）冲击粒子向外消散，武器火焰依然明亮，蓝色幽灵像被打散一部分般闪烁虚化。（UI层）伤害数字开始减少，底部标语用 @promo_logo_slogan_glow_ui_215535.png 做一次强化闪亮，形成宣传收口。[05s-06s] （背景层）回到稳定的“活海报”状态，场景仍是同一地牢大厅。（角色/动作层）英雄停在一个略微前倾、充满压迫感的收尾姿态，仍与首帧主体构图一致。（特效层）保留淡淡余烬拖尾和轻薄绿雾。（UI层）顶部Logo与底部标语保持清晰明亮，作为可无缝切入后续实机战斗的结尾画面。镜头语言：竖屏手游构图，低机位动态海报视角，镜头基本锁定，仅在命中瞬间做极轻微推近，不做复杂运镜，不抖动。光影：主角受高反差漫画式主光照亮，幽灵有蓝绿色边缘光，武器有暖橙火焰辉光，兜帽和护甲有轻微轮廓光。成片要求：4K超清，电影级纹理，细节丰富，边缘清晰，画面稳定，面部稳定不变形，五官清晰，结构正常，比例自然，动作不僵硬，UI可读，无抖动。
